player_notes.jalen williams: OUT for Game 7 vs. Spurs (hamstring). Zero usage — fade all props.
player_notes.mitchell robinson: Broken right pinkie finger; plans to play in NBA Finals Game 1 with a brace. Monitor for minutes restriction and reduced rebounding/finishing impact near the rim.

game_notes.SAS vs OKC: Jalen Williams (hamstring) is OUT for Game 7, removing OKC's second-best scorer. Expect elevated usage and prop upside for SGA and other Thunder role players absorbing his 30+ playoff minutes.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Jalen Williams' hamstring recovery timeline is the primary OKC health variable heading into R2 — his return would restore their ceiling to its highest level; SGA's playmaking expansion (8 AST in G4) and Holmgren's double-double consistency are the tactical patterns that define OKC's R2 identity regardless of Williams' availability.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News confirms Williams returned for Game 6 of the Western Conference Finals (played 10 minutes, scored 1 point) but will NOT play in Game 7 vs. Spurs. The context doc last tracked Williams as OUT during R1 vs PHX and mentions him as a health variable for R2, but does not reflect his brief G6 return or his confirmed G7 absence in the WCF.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Jalen Williams' status to: returned briefly in WCF G6 (10 min, 1 pt), but confirmed OUT for WCF Game 7 vs. Spurs on 2026-05-30. His hamstring remains a limiting factor. Remove any implication that his return is imminent or that his availability is merely uncertain.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: TIER-WALK DIRECTIVE: PTS T20 is pre-qualified for SGA. The streak makes T20 a structural lock. 'Playoff confirmation (G1 vs PHX, Apr 19): SGA scored 25 on 5-18 FG — inefficient shooting night but still cleared T20 comfortably. Streak intact through first playoff game.'
suggested_context_updates.conflict: News headline states 'Gilgeous-Alexander finished with less than half his regular-season average as the Thunder dropped Game 6' of the WCF. His regular-season average was 30.0 PPG, meaning he scored approximately 14-15 points in G6 — which would end his consecutive 20-point games streak if accurate.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Investigate and update SGA's consecutive 20-point games streak status. If he scored below 20 in WCF Game 6, the historic streak has ended and the T20 structural lock directive must be revoked entirely. The tier-walk directive starting at T20 as a pre-qualified lock cannot stand if the streak is broken. Treat SGA's PTS props with standard tier-walk evaluation until streak status is confirmed.
